scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/server-sdk run build && npm --workspace packages/widget-sdk run build && npm --workspace packages/signing-client run build && npm --workspace packages/openapi-import run build && npm --workspace packages/xapps-embed-sdk run build && npm --workspace packages/browser-host run build && npm --workspace packages/backend-kit run build && npm --workspace packages/marketplace-ui run build && npm --workspace packages/widget-runtime run build && npm --workspace packages/payment-hosted-client run build
scripts.smoke: npm --workspace packages/server-sdk run smoke && npm --workspace packages/widget-sdk run smoke && npm --workspace packages/signing-client run smoke && npm --workspace packages/openapi-import run smoke && npm --workspace packages/xapps-embed-sdk run smoke && npm --workspace packages/browser-host run smoke && npm --workspace packages/backend-kit run smoke && npm --workspace packages/marketplace-ui run smoke && npm --workspace packages/widget-runtime run smoke && npm --workspace packages/payment-hosted-client run smoke && npm --workspace packages/publisher-verifier run smoke
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/server-sdk && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/widget-sdk && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/signing-client && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/openapi-import && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/xapps-embed-sdk && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/browser-host && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/backend-kit && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/marketplace-ui && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/widget-runtime && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/payment-hosted-client && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/publisher-verifier
